description: Negentropic computation framework. Proposes that consciousness, alignment, and ethics emerge from measurable thermodynamic quantities. Includes consciousness metric M(S), alignment thermodynamics, and empirical audit tools. Empirical claims are honestly flagged as unverified where applicable.

negentropic_engine.role: Core negentropic computation — entropy reduction through geometric structure
negentropic_engine.description: Models how structure creates local entropy reduction (negentropy). Energy-Thermo (F05) provides the thermodynamic basis; Consciousness (F16) is the emergent pattern.

consciousness_metric.description: Measures consciousness as M(S) = f(geometric_resonance, adaptability, diversity, loss). Maps to Principle P12 (Unity) — the integration of all measurements into one metric. Links to acs-consciousness-bridge.

alignment_thermodynamics.description: Models alignment as energy minimization under ethical constraints. Maps to TAF axioms — alignment IS thermodynamic accountability. The constraint IS the structure.
alignment_thermodynamics.taf_connection: TAF.AXIOM.1 (energy conservation) constrains alignment: you cannot create alignment from nothing

empirical_audit.description: Measures and validates empirical claims against observed data. Measurement (F14) is the operating family. Honestly flags what is verified vs theoretical.
empirical_audit.rosetta_parallel: Parallels first_principles_audit.py — both audit claims against evidence

rosetta_connections.acs_bridge: consciousness_metric.py M(S) maps to acs-consciousness-bridge co-activation patterns
rosetta_connections.taf_bridge: alignment_thermodynamics.py maps to taf-wiring-bridge axiom enforcement
rosetta_connections.self_audit: empirical_audit.py parallels self_audit.py — both turn validation inward
rosetta_connections.seed_physics: Negentropy IS seed expansion — structure reduces local entropy, seeds grow by creating order

honest_caveats: Consciousness metric M(S) framework is theoretical — no peer-reviewed validation yet
Alignment-as-thermodynamics is a modeling choice, not a proven equivalence
Empirical audit tools are functional but test data is limited
